'''latulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poachard|poachard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poachard|poachard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| latulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lætilith|lætilith]] || [[word:lætilij|lætilij]] || [[word:lætilish|lætilish]] || [[word:lætili|lætili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:latutuluth|latutuluth]] || [[word:latutuluj|latutuluj]] || [[word:latutulush|latutulush]] || [[word:latutulu|latutulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:latuluth|latuluth]] || [[word:latuluj|latuluj]] || [[word:latulush|latulush]] || [[word:latulu|latulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:latufluth|latufluth]] || [[word:latufluj|latufluj]] || [[word:latuflush|latuflush]] || [[word:latufluf|latufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:latuluthu|latuluthu]] || [[word:latuluju|latuluju]] || [[word:latulushu|latulushu]] || [[word:latuluku|latuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:latuluth|latuluth]] || [[word:latuluj|latuluj]] || [[word:latulush|latulush]] || [[word:latulu|latulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:latuluthul|latuluthul]] || [[word:latulujul|latulujul]] || [[word:latulushul|latulushul]] || [[word:latulukul|latulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:latuluthuthu|latuluthuthu]] || [[word:latulujuju|latulujuju]] || [[word:latulushushu|latulushushu]] || [[word:latuluku|latuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:latuluthun|latuluthun]] || [[word:latulujun|latulujun]] || [[word:latulushun|latulushun]] || [[word:latulukun|latulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:latuluthuoro|latuluthuoro]] || [[word:latulujuoro|latulujuoro]] || [[word:latulushuoro|latulushuoro]] || [[word:latulukuoro|latulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
